entry.title: Re: SAP Ariba Intake Management: A Seamless, User-Centric Solution with Powerful Extensibility
entry.content: Indeed Insightful!!! Look forward to know more.

entry.title: Generative AI with SAP – Introduction to SAP Business AI
entry.content:
In today’s fast-evolving digital economy, businesses are constantly seeking ways to increase productivity, make smarter decisions, and personalize customer experiences. Artificial Intelligence (AI) has become a core driver of this change, and SAP is leading the way with SAP Business AI—a powerful suite of AI capabilities embedded directly into SAP business processes.

In this post, we’ll introduce SAP Business AI, explore Generative AI, and highlight how tools like Joule, SAP’s new AI copilot, are transforming the enterprise landscape.

What Is SAP Business AI?

SAP Business AI is SAP’s portfolio of enterprise-grade AI technologies integrated across its cloud applications and platforms. Unlike general-purpose AI, SAP Business AI is:

  • Context-aware

  • Built for business

  • Responsible by design

Key Components:

  • Embedded AI in core SAP apps like S/4HANA, SuccessFactors, and Customer Experience

  • Industry-specific AI scenarios

  • Business-centric models trained on anonymized SAP data

  • Tools for AI development, deployment, and monitoring

What Is Generative AI?

Generative AI refers to AI that can create new content—such as text, images, code, and more. Using large language models (LLMs), it can generate human-like outputs from natural language prompts.

In a business context, Generative AI powers:

  • Automated document creation (e.g., job descriptions, invoices)

  • Summarization of reports and meeting notes

  • Personalized marketing content

  • Code generation and debugging support

  • Intelligent chatbots and virtual assistants

How SAP Integrates Generative AI

SAP’s approach to Generative AI is enterprise-centric and secure.

1. SAP Joule – Your AI Copilot

Meet Joule: SAP’s new natural language copilot embedded throughout SAP’s cloud portfolio.

With Joule, users can:

  • Retrieve real-time insights

  • Automate tasks with plain-language commands

  • Converse with business data contextually

Example:
Prompt: “What are the top 5 vendors based on last quarter’s delivery performance?”
Joule: Delivers a contextual, accurate answer—instantly.

2. Strategic Partnerships with Leading AI Providers

SAP partners with OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google Cloud Vertex AI to deliver cutting-edge LLM capabilities while ensuring data security, privacy, and compliance.

3. Developer Enablement via SAP AI Core and Launchpad

  • SAP AI Core: Infrastructure for managing and deploying AI models

  • SAP AI Launchpad: Tools to monitor and govern models responsibly

These tools empower developers to integrate Generative AI into custom workflows using the SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP).

Real-World Use Cases Across SAP

SAP is already using Generative AI in:

  • HR: Writing job descriptions, drafting interview questions

  • Finance: Summarizing financial reports

  • Customer Service: Enhancing chat support with smart assistants

  • Procurement: Drafting RFQs, analyzing supplier performance

  • Marketing: Creating personalized campaign content

Responsible AI by Design

SAP is committed to ethical, transparent AI use. Its approach includes:

  • Transparency – Letting users know when AI is used

  • Privacy – Ensuring anonymized, secure data handling

  • Fairness – Avoiding bias in training and outputs

Backed by SAP’s AI Ethics Policy and governance framework, customers can trust that SAP Business AI is aligned with industry best practices.

Getting Started with SAP Business AI

Ready to explore?

  • Try Joule in your SAP applications

  • Explore SAP AI Core and AI Launchpad on SAP BTP

  • Visit the SAP Discovery Center for use cases

  • Join the SAP Community to connect with experts

Generative AI is no longer just a buzzword—it’s redefining business operations. SAP Business AI helps organizations unlock AI’s potential in a responsible and familiar environment.

Deep Dive: Meet Joule

What Is Joule?

Imagine a trusted AI assistant embedded throughout your enterprise systems. That’s Joule.

It’s an intelligent, conversational AI copilot designed to:

  • Deliver contextual insights from SAP and third-party data

  • Help users complete tasks faster

  • Maintain compliance and data security standards

How Customers Use Joule

Joule will be embedded across SAP applications—HR, finance, supply chain, procurement, and more.

Example Use Cases:

  1. Sales: Analyze performance across regions and link to supply chain data

  2. HR: Generate inclusive job descriptions

  3. Finance: Automate financial summaries and forecasting

  4. Customer Support: Resolve issues faster with contextual data

Key Features of Joule

  • Conversational UI using SAP Fiori design principles

  • Out-of-the-box integration with SAP backend systems

  • Built for compliance – GDPR, SOC-II, AI ethics included

  • Always improving with automatic updates and feature rollouts

Joule in Procurement: Smarter, Faster Decisions

Procurement is a strategic function where speed and accuracy are key. Joule supercharges procurement by enabling:

Real-Time Insights

Ask: “What was our Q1 spend on IT hardware?”
Joule fetches, analyzes, and visualizes instantly.

Supplier Performance Analysis

Ask: “Which vendors had the highest late delivery rate?”
Joule uses embedded analytics to provide actionable insights.

Content Automation

  • Draft RFQs and emails

  • Propose contract language

  • Generate follow-ups automatically

Workflow Acceleration

“Show PRs needing approval”
“Approve all low-risk PRs below $5,000”
Joule speeds up approvals while maintaining controls.

Risk Detection

Ask: “Which POs are missing documentation?”
Joule flags compliance issues in real time.

Why It Matters

In procurement, Joule helps:

  • Make faster decisions

  • Improve team collaboration

  • Detect risks proactively

  • Boost operational efficiency

And it’s only getting better. Coming soon: Full lifecycle procurement support, including sourcing and supplier collaboration.

Conclusion

SAP Business AI and Generative AI are reshaping how businesses operate—responsibly, securely, and intelligently. Tools like Joule make AI accessible and actionable across all departments, helping organizations become more agile, informed, and efficient.

entry.title: SAP HANA Express Edition 2.00.076.00 License upgrade
entry.content:
Hello there,

We have SAP Hana express edition free 32GB (enforced)license installed on RHEL 9.4. We just need to understand how to extend the memory to 64 or 128 GB in future just in case if we need?

If it is possible then please share the steps to generate paid license to convert from SAP Hana Express to same or other SAP HANA DB edition.

Regards

Sandip

entry.title: Production order Release getting rejected (Incorrect Check for order XXXXXXXX)
entry.content:
Hi All

We have a scenario where background program is creating the production order. The configuration is set to release the production order immediately during creation. We have recently upgraded to S4 hana 2023 and we are seeing that the production orders are not getting released automatically now. They are getting RELR status. Since production order does not store error log we are not able to find the cause of rejection. When we are trying to release the same order via CO02 it gets release successfully.

The weird thing is if I first press on material availability button in CO02 I get error  "Incorrect Check
for order XXXXXXXX". In log text its says checking rule missing for order type and plant. But we have all the config present in OPJK. Now if we press release it gets released successfully.

Also if I am using COHV to mass release the production order some order gets fail to release and shows this material availability check error, but if we re process them they get successfully released.

If anyone has any input for this situation it would be great help

entry.title: Intermediate Link Events
entry.content:
Hello all,

I'm looking for some insights how to remediate the overuse of Intermediate Link Events in an organization. They have been using Signavio for 18 months and in the last 8 months a Digital Transformation Project within the business has created some 500 odd models all using multiple intermediate catching/throwing intermediate Link Events. Some processes begin with 5 Intermediate Links with a smattering of 3 or 4 in the middle ending with another 3 and so on and so forth. Leading to hundreds throughout the entire business. How can I go about fixing these? Every time I replace one with the correct start event, for example, I need to go and fix another because I've broken the connection. The rest of the business are not using these events, just this project, unfortunately, it's still creating a significant impact.

entry.title: Re: How to set email notification for rework of Sales doc...
entry.content:
Hi,

The email name must have a pattern

Depending of the configuration in your system

  • <YY1>_<Scenario_id>_CRT_<ACTIVITY_NODEID>
  • <ZZ1>_<Scenario_id>_CRT_<ACTIVITY_NODEID>

That's the reason you need to know the Scenario_id

  • WS02000447 (workflow for sales quotations)
  • WS01800145 (workflow for sales contracts)
  • WS02000006 (workflow for sales orders)
  • WS01800180 (workflow for sales orders without charge)
  • WS02000084 (workflow for customer returns)
  • WS02000029 (workflow for credit memo requests)
  • WS01800202 (workflow for debit memo requests)

And into the scenario the activity node id of "Rework".

 

Check this link

From the link, the Workflow Step is the ACTIVITY_NODEID

Task Number Workflow Step Object Name

WS020004479Release of sales quotation
70Rework of sales quotation
WS020000069Release of sales order
21Rework of sales order
WS0200008439Release of customer return
26Rework of customer return
WS0200002926Release of credit memo request
41Rework of credit memo request
  • YY1_WS02000447_CRT_70 or ZZ1_WS02000447_CRT_70
  • YY1_WS02000006_CRT_21 or ZZ1_WS02000006_CRT_21
  • YY1_WS02000084_CRT_26 or ZZ1_WS02000084_CRT_26
  • YY1_WS02000029_CRT_41 or ZZ1_WS02000029_CRT_41

Are the posibilities

 

Best Regards

entry.title: Prevent approval for working time account
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have configured separate time type for working time account and over time type. We have a requirement, only overtime type  should trigger workflow approval but not working time account time type.  is there a way to prevent working time account time type for workflow approval. I can utilise single record approval for over time type but overtime type has to be replicated to payroll for processing. is there a way to prevent working time account for approval and include only overtime type for approval and further replication to ECP. 

Thanks

Shilpa

entry.title: Re: Field Value is not visible in SAP CAP List Report usi...
entry.content: No... [1..n] relationship...Source table (1) to Target/Associated Table (n)

entry.title: Cartonization Planning with WOCR and POSC in Outbound Logistics in SAP EWM
entry.content:
Introduction:

  • Cartonization Planning in SAP EWM is a proactive, system-driven process used to determine the most efficient way to pack outbound delivery items before any physical picking or packing begins.
  • It calculates the optimal number, size, and type of Handling Units (HUs) required based on detailed product characteristics such as volume, weight, and dimensions.
  • By doing so, the system generates Planned Shipping Handling Units (PSHUs)—virtual representations of how items should be packed.
  • These PSHUs serve as a blueprint during warehouse execution, guiding the creation of actual Pick-HUs and streamlining downstream processes like picking, packing, staging, and loading.
  • This not only reduces packaging waste and handling time but also ensures consistency, cost-efficiency, and compliance with shipping requirements.
  • For instance, if a delivery contains 10 items with different weights and volumes, Cartonization Planning helps predefine virtual cartons (PSHUs), guiding the picker to use exactly two Pick-HUs during execution.

                            Below is the Picture which Shows how Cartonization Works       

  • PSHUs in SAP EWM can be created through the following methods:
  1. Outbound Delivery Orders.
  2. Wave.
  3. Warehouse order Creation Rule (WOCR).

 This blog explains how Cartonization Planning can be executed using Warehouse Order Creation Rules (WOCR) integrated with the POSC (Process-Oriented Storage Control) scenario.

Configuration Required:                                     

  • Activate the BC Sets: /SCWM/CAP*   T-code: SCPR20     

Activate all the above BC Sets and copy your warehouse number for all the BC sets.

  • Configure Cartonization Planning on Warehouse Number Level.

Simg --> SCM EWM --> EWM --> Goods Issue Process --> Cartonization Planning --> Configure Cartonization Planning on Warehouse Number Level.                            

The above Determination Procedure and Layout will be Automatically Assigned to our warehouse once we activate the BC Sets.

  • Configure Cartonization Planning on Warehouse Number Level.

Simg --> SCM EWM --> EWM --> Goods Issue Process --> Cartonization Planning --> Define Algorithm profiles for Cartonization Planning.

  • Define Access Sequence for Algorithm Profiles.

Simg --> SCM EWM --> EWM --> Goods Issue Process --> Cartonization Planning --> Define Access Sequence for Algorithm Profiles.                  

                                                

             

  • Define Process Profiles for Cartonization Planning.

Simg --> SCM EWM --> EWM --> Goods Issue Process --> Cartonization Planning --> Define Process Profiles for Cartonization Planning.

  • Determine Process Profiles for Cartonization Planning.

Simg --> SCM EWM --> EWM --> Goods Issue Process --> Cartonization Planning --> Determine Process Profile for Cartonization Planning    

  • To Enable Automatic PSHU Creation we need to enable BADI in our system

                              BADI : /SCWM/EX_CAP_ALGORITHM. (Go to T-code Se18 and See whether the BADI is Activated or not).

                                            Packaging Specification:

  • Simg --> SCM EWM --> EWM --> Master Data --> Packaging Specification --> Define Packaging Specification Group.                               

                     

  • Simg --> SCM EWM --> EWM --> Master Data --> Packaging Specification --> Maintain Structure of Packaging Specification.

Define Level type:                                    

Define Element Type:

Define Level Set:                   

Define WorkStep:

Define Packaging Material Type:

Assign Packaging Material type to Element Type:

Assign Work Step to Packaging Material type:

Now Assign Level Set in the Packaging Specification Group:                        

                                              Warehouse Order Creation Rule:

 Simg --> SCM EWM --> EWM --> Cross-Process Settings --> Warehouse Order:

Define Packing Profile for Warehouse Order Creation Rule:

Define Creation Rule for Warehouse Order:

Define Search Sequence for Creation Rules for Activity Areas:

Now Assign WOCR in WPT:

                                                  Master Data:

  • Define Number Ranges for PSHU:

Simg --> SCM EWM --> EWM --> Goods Issue Process --> Cartonization Planning --> Define Number Ranges for Identification of PSHUs

  • Determine Algorithm Profiles for Cartonization Planning: (/n/scwm/cappdet)

  • Create Packaging Material: (T-code: MM01)  (Give Weight, Volume for the Packaging Material)       

For Testing Purpose, Here Volume is taken as 10 L , Gross Weight is taken as 20 KG and Net weight is Taken as 15 KG and Material Type will be VERP.

  • Maintain Packaging Specification – (/n/scwm/Packspec)     

  1.    Activate Log for CAP – Object: CAP ----- /n/scwm/ACTLOG

  1. Assign bin for Auto Pick HU Creation: /n/scwm/Seba

  1. Now go to Packaging Specification : (/n/scwm/Packspec)

Add Packaging Profile Condition:

                                            Testing:

Create an outbound Delivery in vl01n:

Now Save it.

Here Outbound Delivery got Distributed to EWM.

Now go to T-code: /n/scwm/PRDO and enter the Delivery Number and Execute:

Now Create the Warehouse Task:

Now Click on Create and Save it and warehouse Task will be created.

Now go to Confirm in the Warehouse Task tab and Check the WOCR and Product WT:

Go to Pick-HU Tab:

Don’t Confirm the Warehouse Order as of now and take the Delivery Number and go to Monitor and execute it:

 

Now Check the Warehouse Order, Warehouse Task, HU and PSHU tabs for the above Delivery.

Go to PSHU Tab to see if the system generated any PSHU’s:

Now go to Warehouse Order Tab:

Now go to Warehouse Task Tab and confirm WT in Background:

Now before Confirming the Open Warehouse Task, Go to Handling Unit tab and you can observe  Pick-Hu created by system with Weight volume Packaging material type, Packaging type , Packaging Group as shown below:

Now Click on HU Identification Tab:

Now Confirm the Open Warehouse Task in the Background:

Now once the Open Warehouse Task got Confirmed, go to Packing Work Centre (/n/scwm/Pack). You can see in Single Pack Bin, Two Products are Packed already as shown below:

Now Close the HU by clicking on the below Highlighted Symbol:

After CloseHU, Click on Save and task will be created as shown below:

Now go back to Monitor and Refresh it and you can observe Next Task for Staging will be Created by the System Automatically.

Now Confirm the Open Staging Warehouse Task in the Background and then system Automatically creates Loading step as shown below:

Now Confirm the Warehouse task for Loading in the Background:

Now Go back to Desktop and you can observe Picking, Packing and Loading Status are completed, and Goods is not Started.

Now do the Goods Issue and System will generate Outbound Delivery as shown below:

Conclusion:

Cartonization Planning with WOCR ensures optimized HU creation before picking begins. By virtually simulating packing scenarios through PSHUs, warehouses can reduce waste, speed up operations, and streamline the pick-pack-ship process. If implemented correctly, it’s a powerful enhancement to standard outbound flows in SAP EWM.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

.

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP With Prostgres Serice in BTP
entry.content:
Hi Satya,

 

I was able to successfully connect to the PostgreSQL DB instance, deploy my database artifacts, and perform CRUD operations via Postman.

However, I'm still unable to run the CAPM application locally from BAS and retrieve data from the PostgreSQL instance.

I’ve maintained the DB credentials in the .cdsrc-private.json file, but when I execute the service endpoint locally, I encounter the following error:

Could you please share the required configuration or steps to run the application locally in BAS while connecting to the PostgreSQL DB instance?

entry.title: Re: Intercompany Financial Posting 1GP - Different tax co...
entry.content:
Hello @Gabor5 ,

My apologies for the delay,

Even with a 0% tax code like V0, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition treats the entry as tax-relevant, and intercompany journal entries across different tax countries are restricted. This is due to compliance and system design rules. SAP recommends using intercompany AR/AP flows or standard business scenarios to handle such transactions correctly.

Let me know if you need more support

Thank you and kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: Displaying Rich (Formatted) text in SAP ADOBE form
entry.content:
Nice Blog very usefull.

But in 2025, with SAP cloud, we do not have access to the Adobe interface neither to translation module.

So Any idea how, from a standard text created from Fiori app "Manage Texts", to have some words within the text in bold?

Example: This is a text where the BOLD word is in bold.

Regards

entry.title: Offboarding 1.0 pending task concern when we are live with offboarding 2.0
entry.content:
We are currently live with offboarding 1.0 and in upcoming month we are going live with offboarding 2.0. Is there a possibility to have OFB 1.0 available to complete the pending offboarding cases along already live with OFB 2.0?

can someone share the guidance?

SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding #offboarding

entry.title: Web & Mobile App Development Option is not available in SAP Built Apps Under BTP Trial Account
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I was following below learning path for Web & Mobile Application Development through SAP Built App, but that option is not available as shown in exercise of the learning path. Below is the link.

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/develop-apps-with-sap-build-apps-using-drag-and-drop-simplicity/getting-acquainted-with-sap-build-apps 

Is that option has been removed from trial account or I'm doing something wrong. 

Any help would be much appreciated. 

Thank you all.

entry.title: Tax Clearance Certificates Ireland for payment blocks
entry.content:
Hi there,

Can anyone please advise if SAP ERP is capable to block payments to the suppliers based on the validity of their tax clearance certificates? This question is for an organization based in Ireland.

Thank you

Faraz

entry.title: Standard Story report not picking all employees despite no filter on the query ?
entry.content:
HI @ALL 

We have been encountering issues with exported standard reports - where different standard reports are skipping employees in the output. 

We have checked on main query itself and there are no filters -  & we try to regenerate same query from scratch users are reflecting ? 

Such inconsistent behavior is making our client doubt the stability of story report and are asking for reconciliation - reconciliation of something which itself should be used for the same?

Eventually , on comparing with table report - discrepancy still reflect. 

Anyone encountered something similar or troubleshooted such case ?

entry.title: Re: SAP API Management - How to create a Cloud Integration Flow API Provider
entry.content: everything is fine until i go check the api provider it created, idk what happen there, also, when i selected the artifact after click the discovery button it asked to put persistent credentials.

entry.title: Re: Custom Fields can be seen in Create Sales Orders - VA01 but cannot be seen in Create Sales Order
entry.content: Facing the same issue. For my new Custom field which I plan to use on sales order item level, C_SALESORDERMANAGE_SD (OData Service), SalesOrderItemType (OData Entity), C_SALESORDERITEMMANAGE (CDS View) and SAP GUI SD_SALESDOCITEM_GUI were enabled but I only see new field in Manage sales order app but not in the Manage sales order - Version 2 app. Where am I supposed to see Custom tab fields in the new app? Thanks

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA TM– Conversational planning using Generative AI!! step by step configuration walkthrough
entry.content:
Generative AI is rapidly transforming how enterprises operate, and at SAP, it is not viewed as a standalone innovation—but as an embedded, value-driving component across our business applications. With each release of SAP S/4HANA, new AI-powered features are being introduced to enhance user experience and optimize operations.

One such advancement is available in SAP S/4HANA Transportation Management 2023 FPS02 (currently available for private cloud deployments only). This release introduces a generative AI–driven enhancement aimed at improving the user experience via conversational transportation planning.

In this blog, we’ll explore this new feature in detail—including how it works, how to configure it, and how you can test it in your own landscape

Architecture

As illustrated in the diagram, the Intelligent Scenario Lifecycle Management (ISLM) framework acts as the key integration layer connecting SAP S/4HANA Transportation Management (TM) with Business Technology Platform (BTP) Generative AI services. For this purpose, SAP delivers a standard ISLM scenario. The entire end-to-end process—from initiating AI requests to receiving intelligent transportation planning insights—is managed through a dedicated Generative AI profile within SAP TM, ensuring smooth orchestration and configuration.

⚙️Configuration Steps

To enable the generative AI-powered UI enrichment feature in SAP S/4HANA Transportation Management, follow these key configuration steps:

  1. Set Up Connection for the ISLM Scenario Using the Generative AI Hub Service Key
    1. Obtain Service Key
      Retrieve the service key from the Generative AI Hub in your SAP BTP subaccount. This key enables secure communication between your S/4HANA system and the AI services.
    2. Create Connection Mapping
      Configure the communication arrangement in S/4HANA by mapping the service key to the ISLM (Intelligent Scenario Lifecycle Management) scenario. This step establishes the link between S/4HANA and the AI Hub.
    3. Deploy and Activate ISLM Scenario
      Deploy the ISLM scenario and activate the necessary services within S/4HANA to enable generative AI functionalities.
  2. Configure the Generative AI Profile in SAP S/4HANA
    1. Define Capabilities and Group into Profiles
      Specify the required generative AI capabilities that your planners need and organize them into profiles for efficient management.
    2. Assign Profiles to Cockpit Page Layouts
      Link the created profiles to the relevant transportation cockpit page layouts. Add the necessary fields to the UI to display the dynamically enriched data from the AI.

🔧Prerequisites

Before diving into the configuration, ensure the following prerequisites are met:

  • Deployment Environment:
    Your SAP S/4HANA system must be deployed on Private Cloud Edition.
  • Generative AI Hub Access:
    You need access to the Generative AI Hub via the AI Core service on your SAP BTP subaccount.
  • S/4HANA User Setup:
    Ensure you have a user in SAP S/4HANA with the following:
    • The SAP_BR_ANALYTICS_SPECIALIST business role
    • The S-ISM-DEPL authorization (this can be on the same or a different user)

With the prerequisites in place, let’s now dive deeper into the detailed configuration and explore how to bring this powerful generative AI feature to life in your SAP S/4HANA Transportation Management system.

1. Connection setup for ISLM scenario using Generative AI hub service key in S/4HANA

1a.Obtain Service Key

Service key can be obtained by raising an SAP support ticket on component CA-S4H-BTPAI as mentioned in the Note 3573759.

You can also generate the service key if you have an instance of SAP AI Core in your BTP subaccount.

1b. Create Connection Mapping

Once you have the service key, navigate to SPROABAP PlatformApplication ServerBasis ServicesIntelligent Scenario Lifecycle ManagementService Connection for Machine Learning InfrastructureMaintain Connection for an Intelligent Scenario. Click create and provide the details as shown with your own Service key

 

Click Next and once connection is ready, you can test the connection. It must show ‘Ready’.

 

1c. Deploy and activate ISLM scenario

Now you must activate the scenario.  Login to Fiori launchpad of your S/4HANA system and open ‘Intelligent Scenario Management’ app. Search for Intelligent scenario GENAI_TM_COPL_GPT4O

 

Select the Scenario and on details screen, ‘Deploy’ it.

 

 

It may take couple of minutes to finish deployment, until then status will be Deployment Pending.

 

You can view the deployed model once done.

 

That’s it!

Now let’s configure in TM on how to use this deployed scenario.

2.Configure Generative AI Profile in S/4HANA

Generative AI features will continue to be embedded in SAP Transportation Management across upcoming releases, with this initial delivery laying the critical foundation for future innovations. In essence, generative AI functionalities are configured as capabilities, where each capability is linked to a specific capability type and managed through an ISLM scenario.

2a.Define required capabilities and group them into a GenAI profile

As of now, below are the pre-delivered capabilities

 

You may add the capabilities as you need via SPROTransportation ManagementBasic FunctionsGenerative Artificial IntelligenceDefine Generative AI Profile.

Now, define a profile with type ‘Conversational Planning’ and assign the capabilities you need in the profile.

2b.Assign Profiles to Cockpit Page Layouts

Next step is to link the profile to the transportation cockpit page layout.  Open app ‘Page Layout for Transportation Cockpit’ Fiori app and create a new layout or add the conversational planning profile created in earlier step to an existing layout.

One of the standout innovations in this release is UI enrichment powered by Generative AI—bringing intelligence and flexibility directly into the transportation planning cockpit.

Traditionally, planners rely on a large set of data columns within the Freight Unit (FU) or Freight Order (FO) quadrants to make informed decisions. However, displaying too many columns upfront often leads to performance bottlenecks and a cluttered user interface.

With this new feature, SAP introduces a smarter approach. The cockpit now loads with just a single placeholder column—initially empty. Planners can then interactively enrich this column on demand using natural language commands. For example, a planner might say:
“Enrich freight unit with planned delivery date, destination location, and gross weight.”

The system then gathers the relevant information from backend services and dynamically fills the column with the requested data.

This on-demand enrichment:

  • Reduces UI load time and complexity
  • Improves overall system performance
  • Empowers planners with a cleaner, more personalized interface

You must activate this new dynamic column in the field catalog assigned to page layout.

With this step, you are all done and ready to test the Generative AI capabilities in Transportation Cockpit!!

Here are some examples.

Selecting Freight Unit and enrich additional data

Select freight order and enrich data

 

Planning FU to truck

Some example prompts are;(deselect also works same way, same select prompt works the same way for freight unit and freight order)

select the stages going to <property of the location>

select the four heaviest stages

select the stages picked up on <property of date>

select the stages departing from <property of city>

select all stages from the warehouse in location <location>

select the freight unit stage going to region <property of state>

select the trucks with the highest weight capacity

select the trucks with the depot location in <property of location>

enrich all stages with the earliest pickup date and latest delivery date

enrich all freight units with the products

assign freight unit stages going out from <property of location> to freight order <enter a fitting property>

assign freight unit stages containing the product <property of product> to the <property of truck>/<property of freight order>

assign the freight unit stages from <property of location> to be picked up on <property of date> to the temperature-controlled truck with the highest capacity

These are just some samples, you can create prompts with the pattern of your choice and try out.

The integration of Generative AI capabilities into SAP S/4HANA Transportation Management marks a significant leap forward in optimizing transportation planning processes. Leveraging the Intelligent Scenario Lifecycle Management framework and the powerful GPT-4 Omni model, businesses can now achieve smarter, faster, and more adaptive planning outcomes.

In the next blog, I will delve into the concepts that enable further enhancement of this feature

entry.title: Re: Defaulting Incoterms and Payment Terms in Purchase Order
entry.content: Hello, at PO header I´m adding a PO condition for freight and I´m using a different vendor than the one in the PO; how can S4 obtein the payment term for this freight vendor?

entry.title: Re: How to resolve "backend error occurred" in SAP GUI for HTML (WebGUI)
entry.content:
Hello @cesarregis !

We can see by the "ID: 785069" that  the affected system has Kernel 785 SP69 which is out of support/maintenance. Consider moving to 7.89 which is supported and the issue reported is likely resolved.

See also SAP Note 3296726 - Using Kernel 7.89 instead of Kernel 7.81 or 7.85

 

All the best,

Lucas

entry.title: Re: Automating Comment Backup and Retrieval in SAC – Guid...
entry.content: Hi Nikhil,

entry.title: Re: Automating Comment Backup and Retrieval in SAC – Guid...
entry.content:
Hi Nikhil,

Thanks for the response. This information would be really helpful.

entry.title: Clean Core in SAP S/4HANA: Best Practices for Future-Proof Extensions
entry.content:
The “Clean Core” approach aims to minimize custom code within the digital core of SAP S/4HANA. Instead of modifying standard SAP objects, organizations are encouraged to extend functionality through well-defined APIs, events, and standardized extension points—either within the system (in-app) or outside of it (side-by-side).

The benefits are clear:

  • Easier upgrades and reduced technical debt
  • Improved system performance and stability
  • Faster time-to-innovation with modern technologies
  • Stronger alignment with SAP’s cloud-first roadmap

SAP has made it clear: the cleaner your core, the more future-ready your business.

Extension Options in S/4HANA: In-App vs. Side-by-Side

SAP S/4HANA provides two primary extensibility models, each with distinct use cases.

In-App Extensions (Embedded in S/4HANA)

These are made inside the core system, using SAP-provided tools to add or adapt functionality without modifying standard code.

Common tools:

  • Key User Extensibility (Custom Fields, UI adaptations)
  • ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model (RAP)
  • Business Add-Ins (BAdIs)
  • Fiori App Extensions

Best for:

  • Simple UI customizations
  • Adding fields to standard reports
  • Enhancing workflows or business rules
  • Light logic tightly coupled to standard objects

Benefits:

  • Seamless user experience
  • Lower latency
  • Tight integration with S/4HANA processes

Limitations:

  • Still resides in the same system as the digital core
  • Needs regression testing with upgrades
  • Limited in scope for complex or non-SAP integrations

Side-by-Side Extensions (On SAP BTP or External Platforms)

These are built outside the core system, often on the SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP), and communicate with S/4HANA via APIs and events.

Common tools:

  • SAP BTP & Cloud Foundry
  • Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP)
  • SAP Event Mesh & API Management
  • Node.js, Java, or other open languages

Best for:

  • Complex business applications
  • AI/ML services and integrations
  • Multi-system data orchestration
  • Customer portals and mobile apps

Benefits:

  • Fully decoupled from the digital core
  • Minimal impact on upgrades
  • Uses modern cloud-native technologies
  • Scales independently

Limitations:

  • More complex to architect and monitor
  • Requires integration governance
  • Latency may be a factor for real-time scenarios

Best Practices for Clean Core Extensibility

To keep your S/4HANA system lean, modern, and agile, follow these best practices:

  1. Default to Side-by-Side for Custom Applications
    Unless you need tight coupling to a UI or standard process, side-by-side is the safer, more scalable choice.
  2. Use SAP-Provided APIs and CDS Views
    Build on standard services whenever possible to avoid low-level custom code.
  3. Adopt RAP for In-App Enhancements
    If in-app logic is needed, use the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model to align with SAP’s future direction.
  4. Avoid Classic Modifications and Z-Code in the Core
    Stay away from code that alters SAP-delivered objects. If you must, document and isolate it with ATC (ABAP Test Cockpit).
  5. Apply DevOps and CI/CD for All Extensions
    Treat both in-app and side-by-side extensions with modern lifecycle management, including Git-based version control and automated testing.
  6. Govern APIs and Events Carefully
    Set up a clear governance model for exposing and consuming services to ensure security, versioning, and traceability.
  7. Think Long-Term and Modular
    Design loosely coupled services that can evolve independently. Avoid single monolithic apps that recreate the very bloat Clean Core is meant to avoid.

Real-World Example

A Florida based moving company, wanted to customize its product master data screens with additional attributes for regional compliance and to help customers compare FL moving rates . Instead of modifying standard SAP transactions, the team used Key User tools to add fields (in-app), and built a custom compliance rules engine as a microservice on BTP (side-by-side), triggered via events.

The result? A system that was extensible, upgrade-safe, and ready for future integration with external regulators and AI-driven recommendations.

Clean Core Is Not Optional—It’s Inevitable

As SAP shifts more innovation to the cloud and encourages customers to adopt RISE with SAP, Clean Core isn’t just a best practice—it’s a strategic imperative. Keeping your core system clean ensures you can take advantage of SAP’s latest capabilities without being stuck in a cycle of code refactoring and broken upgrades.

Clean Core enables composability, resilience, and speed—the very traits that define successful digital enterprises.

So the next time you scope out an enhancement to your SAP landscape, ask: Does this keep our core clean? If not, it might be time to rethink the architecture.

entry.title: Can the AS-2 adapter configured in CPI using Sender AS-2 adapter without the TPM.
entry.content: This is to receive EDI files from clients.

entry.title: Re: How to install python libraries PIL, pytesseract, openCV, pdf2image in SAP Cloud Foundry?
entry.content: @lprell, I have studied this question - you have to build your custom buildpack and compile all binaries that you need. This is the path to nowhere… I have replaced pdf2image with pymupdf, but now tesseract is missing.

entry.title: Re: FSCM CM: Merge Tax - SDCM/MM flow
entry.content: Dear Vibha, how are you? Could you please help wiht another question? Is there any setting so that I can display the value of the purchase order item with taxes? The FQM_FLOW table is being updated only with the net value of the purchase order item. Thanks in advance. BR

entry.title: Re: Rebilling of ordered items via customer project
entry.content:
Hi Maik,

Great question—and yes, in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, it is possible to recharge supplier invoice costs to a customer project, but it requires the correct configuration and master data setup.

To recharge supplier invoice costs to a customer in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, ensure the following:

  • The project is a Commercial Project with billable WBS elements.
  • The purchase order and supplier invoice are correctly assigned to the WBS element.
  • The billing method (e.g., time & expenses) and billing profile are properly set up.
  • The cost element used is configured as billable in the project billing profile.
  • Use the "Project Billing – Prepare" and "Project Billing – Request" apps to create and process the billing.

If nothing appears billable, check the billing control settings, GL account mapping, and use "Review Billing Items" for diagnostics

Let me know if you need further support

Thank you and kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: Invoice document - change/move of the positions
entry.content:
Hello Sonja

Thank you for your question—this is a common requirement when adapting form layouts in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, especially for billing documents.

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, Adobe LiveCycle Designer is still used for PDF form design, but the approach differs from the on-premise environment

You can reposition or adjust fields like the Sold-To Party in invoice documents by:

  • Downloading the form via "Maintain Form Templates",
  • Editing with Adobe LiveCycle Designer (available via SAP Software Center),
  • Re-uploading and assigning it via "Output Parameter Determination"

Let me know if you need more information!

With kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: Restricted Access to Pricing Configuration Elements i...
entry.content: The catalog SAP_CA_BC_IC_LND_SD1_PC was implemented and verified, and it successfully activated almost all pricing configuration options, except for the pricing procedure configuration. Would you recommend another catalog specifically for accessing that functionality? I truly appreciate your support in advance—I'm very grateful.

Hola

La app F3423 no esta dejando relacionar la persona responsable a las operaciones de las ordenes filtradas según el periodo de búsqueda.

entry.content:
Hello

The F3423 app is not allowing the responsible person to be linked to the operations of the filtered orders based on the search period. I understand that the app doesn't search for the person linked to the job position; instead, it must be created using the F3888 "Team and Responsibilities Management" app. Could you please tell me how to create a team using the latter app?

entry.title: How to fetch Country of Origin from MARA to MCH1 in batch classification?
entry.content:
Hi Guru,
Country of Origin is maintain at material's level with class type 023.
During batch creation in 101 for GR from PO, the COO still keeps with the material.
How can we copy it to batch master classification?

E.g. How can pass the COO "CN" in MARA on to LOBM_HERKL in MCH1?

I assume deviation is an approach. 
Can we get it done by object dependence?
Thank you,
Sally

entry.title: Re: How to identify vulnerabilities according to our SAP...
entry.content:
see KBA 3169036 - BI 4.2 and BI 4.3 - Fixed CVE and Vulnerabilities List

Always follow the SAP Patch Day every month (2nd Tuesday of the month)
The CVE fixes are published SAP Security Patch Day 

I recommend everyone to update the latest patch, since many critical CVEs, especially those with a "Trusted Authentication", have been remedied.

entry.title: Re: Layout characters limitation Business Objects 4.3
entry.content:
Solution:
Must make changes in the BigQuery.sbo file and increase the value of as required
<Parameter Name="Default Character Column Size">128</Parameter>

see KBA 3298025 - Cell text getting truncated after the 128 character length in WebIntelligence

entry.title: Re: i don't need the line no in my Web intelligence SAP BO report
entry.content: Add an example or screenshot to understand your problem and give you the possible correct answer

entry.title: Re: Field Value is not visible in SAP CAP List Report usi...
entry.content: if it is 1:n, how the framework knows which one to pickup?

entry.title: Re: Error 'No tax code found for difference' in Processin...
entry.content: Hello,   please share us how to solve the issue because we have the same issue

entry.title: IP30 doesn't reschedule maintenance plan as there is an order TECOed
entry.content:
Hi All:

We use IP30 mass schedule maintenance plan. 

We have maintenance order converted from call and TECOed, in order to let new planning follow up with planning key date but not TECO date, we change 2 "Shift Factor" in maintenance plan.

We tested the changes using IP30 in EAQ, maintenance plan is correctly planned at planning key date but not TECO date.

But as we made the change in PRD after a few of days, we found IP30 doesn't reschedule maintenance plan at planning key day but still on TECO date, however, IP10 can reschedule maintenance plan at planning key day but not on TECO date any more. And further at this time we go back to EAQ to test, we found IP10 can  reschedule maintenance plan at planning key day but not on TECO date any more, IP30 doesn't work longer.

Appreciate any sharing.

Yinyun

entry.title: Aps and WACS servers not starting
entry.content: We have been having some issues with the APS and WACS servers not starting. When we start them they just stay initializing. The only way we have remedy this is to re-install the entire BO. Is there any way to fix the servers without re-installing BO

entry.title: Created an iFlow to receive a file and send it to an SFTP server
entry.content:
Hi Everyone

I’ve created an iFlow in SAP Integration Suite (Cloud Integration) that is designed to receive a file and forward it to an SFTP server. The iFlow is deployed and seems to be working

 

When trying to test the API with CURL, I get an error.

curl -v -X POST https://xxxx-iflmap.hcisbp.us2.hana.ondemand.com/http/uploadSFTP -u s-user:pass -H "Content-Type: application/octet-stream" --data-binary "@archivo.txt"

Error: X-message-code: PWD_WRONG

Questions:

Can I use an s-user, or does it have to be a technical user?

What other possible causes could there be?

 

Thanks you

entry.title: Re: Cash Application with Machine Learning - summary info
entry.content:
Hello Ignacio,

I read your blog and its super useful, additionally read the comments from former_member683952, iona

I am working on SAP since 20 years and also worked on Cash App applications extensively, Lockbox with customized code to increase the match rate, High Radius, Esker, but all are more or less same in the hit ratio. In my opinion there is no perfect solution for this as there are too many moving parts. Our friend has raised the concerns on Cash App model by SAP but didn't provide any solution, did you connected with him offline and is there any solution to this business issue, if not then business has to pick some Cash App solution available in market as plain vanilla SAP process will not give any value to them.

entry.title: SAP EarlyWatch Alertについて
entry.content:
ご担当者様


お世話になっております。


 


SAP EarlyWatch Alertセッションからレポートを生成できる認識です。


こちらに対象の日付のものを出力することは可能でしょうか？


例えば、現在(5/20)のものがレポート生成できますが、5/1時点のレポートを生成する方法や手順があれば、


ご教授いただきたいです。


 


以上、よろしくお願いいたします。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP EarlyWatch Alertについて
entry.content:
KBA 1829914 - Customize EWA Reports - SAP Solution Manager によりますと、

EWAは1週間に1回のみスケジュールでき、前の週の月曜日から日曜日までのデータを提供します。EWAを生成するデフォルトの日は月曜日です。この開始日をトランザクションSOLMAN_EWA_ADMINを使用して変更することができます。トランザクションSOLMAN_EWA_ADMINで日を変更しても、EWAレポートの週の範囲は変更されないことに注意してください。日の設定に関係なく、EWAは常に月曜日から日曜日の範囲でEWAレポートを生成します。

つまり、EWAがデフォルトで生成する時間を変更したい場合、例えば毎週月曜日から毎週火曜日に変更することは可能です。

しかしお客様のの説明によれば、5月20日に生成されたEWAを5月1日に生成するように変更したいようですが、EWAは前の週の月曜日から日曜日までのデータを提供しますからそれは不可能です。

5月20日に生成されたEWAは、5月12日から18日までのデータを収集していますが、5月1日に生成されたEWAは4月21日から27日までのデータを収集します。

entry.title: Re: S4HANA Cloud - Error Logs
entry.content: Hi - Did you receive the answer to your above query ? I see only the Apps available to view the logs but no option to read them via API's or any option to enable the notifications

entry.title: How to un-install Simple Diagnostic Agent (SDA) -- Focused Run
entry.content:
To un-install SDA, please follow steps below:

1. Execute ps -fu sapadm on OS level. 

2. Stop all java processes of 'sapadm' user, Stop all /bin/sh ./go.sh processes of user 'sapadm'.  

3. For Windows:
    Delete the directors\files below:
    C:\Program Files\SAP\hostctrl\SMDAgent
    C:\Program Files\SAP\hostctrl\exe\descriptors.d\SimpleDA.lmsldesc 
    For Linux:
    Delete the directors\files below:
    /usr/sap/hostctrl/SMDAgent/
    /usr/sap/hostctrl/exe/descriptors.d/SimpleDA.lmsldesc

4. Restart the SAP Host Agent. 

In case re-install SDA needed, please execute the Mass Action "Install/Update Agent" in the Agent Management Application (Agent Admin UI).

entry.title: Re: Regarding Fixed Asset Depreciation Areas
entry.content: Dear Jeremy, Your assistance was invaluable.I really appreciate your patient support! Without your expertise, I couldn't have solved the problem! I truly appreciate your help once again! Best regards,Yahaha

entry.title: Add a percentage to freight on an AR invoice created by the document generation wizard prior to add
entry.content:
My client needs to add a percentage markup to freight on an AR invoice prior to the document being added. The percentage markup would only apply to a specific set of customers.
My issue is these invoices are either created by document generation wizard, or imported. 
Does anyone know if it’s possible to catch the document add from the document generation wizard prior to actually adding the document?

Is there a way to call a program from transaction notification in Hana? I know this can be done in SQL as I have done it before but I don’t see a way to do it in Hana.

The client is running SAP business one version 10 for Hana

Any assistance you can provide would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: 未本地化國家的公司幣別如何設定？
entry.content: Hi RaymondGiuseppi,

entry.title: BYD2505 GL Trial Balance report issue
entry.content:
how to show reporting structure Hierarchy for field G/L Account in the some reports, eg Trial Balance


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: BYD2505 GL Trial Balance report issue
entry.content:
• Open the Report: Trial Balance, maintain the need data and run the report
  • Then, navigate to view， Click on the three dots to the right of field  G/L Accounts
  • Click characteristic-->Hierarchy section, here you can maintain Display As Hierarchy and the Initial Expansion Level to achieve your expectation

entry.title: Re: 未本地化國家的公司幣別如何設定？
entry.content:
Hi RaymondGiuseppi, wonder if you know the post you share cannot reach to the KBA:2745441.
It said the page has been removed. Just let you know, Thanks for your answer.

entry.title: Re: While debugging in Eclipse, I get an error “no author...
entry.content:
The cause was found.
When implemented from a Public Cloud custom logic app, the ABAP language version is for the key user.
Eclipse does not support value editing during debugging with this language version.
If you want to edit values during debugging, you need to do a BAdI implementation within Eclipse.

entry.title: Entry is no longer valid (check the input)
entry.content: when i deactivate 0056 storage location in 2110 plant it will be effected to other plants also. can help resolved this issue.

entry.title: Is there an extra cost to use SAP Customer Data Cloud for Recruiting?
entry.content: Is there a cost to use SAP Customer Data Cloud for Recruiting? Is there a benefit? I enabled it in my test system as soon as it was available and ran into many issues.  I've revisited it in my test system and it seems they've worked most of the issues out, although there are still some - it appears useable at this point.

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM Welcome Session | APAC | English
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Have you recently requested provisioning of SAP Cloud ALM? We are thrilled to welcome you aboard! Your journey with #SAP Cloud ALM is about to begin, and we’re here to ensure it is smooth and efficient.

To assist you in this journey, we would like to invite you to one of the below online webinars where we’ll guide you through the setup process and answer any questions you may have.

What to Expect in the Webinar

The SAP Cloud ALM Welcome Webinar has been designed to ensure that you and your team are set up for success. During the session, we will:

  • Demonstrate the initial login procedures to access your SAP Cloud ALM tenant.
  • Provide guidance on the next steps to use the solution effectively.
  • Highlight essential training resources to support you and your team’s learning journey.
  • Answer any questions you may have during the session.

Your Next Steps

To make the most of your SAP Cloud ALM onboarding experience, here’s what you need to do:

  1. Share this information with your key stakeholders.

    • Ensure that IT Admins, Project Leads, and Implementation or Operations Partners responsible for SAP Cloud ALM are informed.
    • Don’t forget to forward the webinar invitation to your project implementation partner for their participation.

  2. Register for the Webinar.
    Register Now

We’re excited to embark on this journey with you! Let’s make the most of SAP Cloud ALM together. See you at the webinar!

entry.title: Re: How to fetch Country of Origin from MARA to MCH1 in b...
entry.content: Is BAdi BADI_BATCH_MAT_CHAR_COPY or a smilar BAdI available in your system?

entry.title: Re: Vendor block -> MIRO
entry.content: Did you start with good old 1156325 - BAdIs in the Logistics Invoice Verification environment

entry.title: Re: SAP Table for Budget Report
entry.content: Did you execute an SQL trace during execution of S_ALR_87013558 ?

entry.title: Re: Entry is no longer valid (check the input)
entry.content:
To address the issue related to deactivating storage locations in SAP S/4HANA, I recommend referring to the following SAP Community Blog:
How To Deactivate Storage Location In S/4 HANA 
This allows you to control the use of a storage location without affecting other plants. The article also discusses the implications of these settings on material master data and related transactions.

I hope this helps! Let me know your thoughts or if you have any questions.
Thanks,

Akshay Anil   Linkedin Profile
Technical Consultant, SAP ABAP | BTP | Fiori | Ui5

To assist you in this journey, we would like to invite you to one of the below online webinars where we’ll guide you through the setup process and answer any questions you may have.

What to Expect in the Webinar

The SAP Cloud ALM Welcome Webinar has been designed to ensure that you and your team are set up for success. During the session, we will:

  • Demonstrate the initial login procedures to access your SAP Cloud ALM tenant.
  • Provide guidance on the next steps to use the solution effectively.
  • Highlight essential training resources to support you and your team’s learning journey.
  • Answer any questions you may have during the session.

Your Next Steps

To make the most of your SAP Cloud ALM onboarding experience, here’s what you need to do:

  1. Share this information with your key stakeholders.

    • Ensure that IT Admins, Project Leads, and Implementation or Operations Partners responsible for SAP Cloud ALM are informed.
    • Don’t forget to forward the webinar invitation to your project implementation partner for their participation.

  2. Register for the Webinar.

We’re excited to embark on this journey with you! Let’s make the most of SAP Cloud ALM together. See you at the webinar!

entry.title: Asset accounting - units-produced depreciation key
entry.content:
Hello. I am implementing fixed asset accounting in SAP S4 HANA Cloud for a company in Mexico. This company requires the following areas to exist in the chart of depreciation:

Area 01: This is the main area that posts in real time to Ledger 0L with accounting principle 60 and a straight-line depreciation key.

Area 02: This area does not post and is assigned to Ledger 0L with accounting principle 60. It calculates depreciation for the Machinery and Equipment fixed asset classes using the units-produced depreciation method (key).

Has anyone implemented Area 02? Could you help me with the step-by-step configuration or a manual?

I would greatly appreciate it.

entry.title: Re: How to consume a RAP Behavior Event for R_JOURNAL- SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition ( ABAP CLOUD
entry.content: Removed general tag.

Dear Customer,

Have you recently requested provisioning of SAP Cloud ALM? We are thrilled to welcome you aboard! Your journey with #SAP Cloud ALM is about to begin, and we’re here to ensure it is smooth and efficient.

To assist you in this journey, we would like to invite you to one of the below online webinars where we’ll guide you through the setup process and answer any questions you may have.

What to Expect in the Webinar

The SAP Cloud ALM Welcome Webinar has been designed to ensure that you and your team are set up for success. During the session, we will:

  • Demonstrate the initial login procedures to access your SAP Cloud ALM tenant.
  • Provide guidance on the next steps to use the solution effectively.
  • Highlight essential training resources to support you and your team’s learning journey.

We’re excited to embark on this journey with you! Let’s make the most of SAP Cloud ALM together. See you at the webinar!

entry.title: Re: SAP Document Management ISO:27001/GoBD/DSGVO German Standards
entry.content: Removed general tag.

entry.title: Asset accounting - tax valuation area
entry.content:
Hello. I am implementing fixed asset accounting in SAP S4 HANA Cloud for a company in Mexico. This company requires the following areas to exist in the chart of depreciation:

Area 01: This is the main area that posts in real time to Ledger 0L with accounting principle 60 and a straight-line depreciation key.

Area 05: This is a non-posting tax valuation area assigned to Ledger 0L with accounting principle 60. It calculates fixed asset depreciation according to Mexican tax regulations and takes into account the inflation rate for each period.

Has anyone implemented Area 05? Could you help me with the step-by-step configuration or a manual?

I would greatly appreciate it.

entry.title: Re: DRC eDocument .html file / Tax Payer ID
entry.content: Removed general tag.

entry.title: Re: DRC eDocument .html file / Tax Payer ID
entry.content: Informed expert.

entry.title: 999 storage type difference posting for sto
entry.content:
Hi Experts Please suggest ....

SAP WM managed system .

We are creating Replenishment sto from DC to store via sto order and when ever To is created for outbound delivery many items have short pick and nill pick and all the difference is accumulated in 999 storage type the number is very huge because many stores and many orders . So is there a way to avoid this or to  automatically knock off ?? Please suggest

This occurs for Physical inventory count as well .

entry.title: Re: Bi weekly/Weekly Notifications for pending Time Sheet in SuccessFactors
entry.content: Hi @harinich - If the creating and sending notification works fine manually from manage data, then it should work the same way via IC. IC essentially calls the create or update of MDF. I would suggest to trigger the MDF creation via IC with rule trace. Also check if the IC operation is set correctly to "UPSERT SINGLE" and not others.  If IC is not able to create/update the MDF then you need to redo /check the IC config

hello @Yong_Yu 

My customer want to change output file layout. they want to add some field in the output file .

can you tell me someplace where can fullfill this request?

entry.title: BTP Workzone (standard) update config to allow additional origin
entry.content:
Hi,

Anyone has idea how to configure BTP/BTP Workzone to allow additional origin called from the third-party URL?

Scenario below: Using OCI catalog punch out scenario -> that Workzone hosted the S/4 Standard App- Webdynpro Change maintenance order App will launch a third-party catalog in a new tab when user click on select catalog button in the component screen, and the third-party catalog URL will post the selected data back to SAP via hook URL maintained in the configuration in table WSI_CALLSTRUC.

The hook URL we have maintained the BTP Workzone backend destination URL: for example:
https://<subaccount-host>-sapdelim-s4d05rt500.launchpad.cfapps.ca10.hana.ondemand.com/sap/bc/rest/sap/oci_catalog

where this URL is where we observe how the workzone route other odata Call from workzone to backend S/4.

We are getting the error below from the BTP response after user click submit the cart in the catalog page that trigger to the HOOK_URL.

Note: We found out this error is responded by the BTP, not by the local browser, hence something needs to be done in BTP to allow this origin, not the normal CORS blocked by the common browser scenario.

What we found out further due to the third party will set the HTTP request header "Origin":"https://www.grainger.ca" in the hook URL request that is causing the issue where blocked by BTP/BTP workzone.

We have try simulate the same request from postman, able to get the same error. However, once we remove the Orgin from the HTTP header, it is able to post to the backend with 200 error success.

So far found this note 3169523 - Configure Tenant Security Header for CAI - SAP for Me that is allow us to configure additional origin, but is applicable for CAI only, not for Workzone.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: AIF customizing screen not allowing to use /TMINT nam...
entry.content: SAP On Premise, right? You may Unlock the namespace using transaction /AIF/NS_LOCK. And you have to understand '/' is reversed for SAP https://me.sap.com/notes/3071632/E.

entry.title: Re: #CoE#LAL Change output file content in create Golden...
entry.content: Currently, the output fields can't be changed. Please try to reuse the as-is unused fields to put customer's contents.
